rawContent:
Tweet by @nyk_builderz (Nyk 🌱)
Author bio: co-founder @builderzdotdev | founder @splitlabsio | member @superteamDE | building AI agents + solana apps | open source | coding edge, buying fear
Text: Everyone is debating the leak.
Almost nobody is reading the roadmap hidden inside it.

512k lines didn’t just expose code — they exposed where coding agents are going next:
always-on execution, background memory, and autonomous workflows.

If you’re building agents, this is required reading.
